title: Casual Vanilla
description: This vanilla-like modpack is made for casual Minecraft players like me. I don't like the rush to get diamonds and kill the Ender Dragon. I love slow gameplay where I find happiness in the little things.
body:
![Casual Vanilla text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2841c90eb80e0cb85f3a976f0ece62f9b93d4454.png)
**Casual Vanilla** is vanilla-like modpack designed for casual Minecraft players. 

It adds a lot of graphics and audio changes like 3d flowers, new ambient sounds, faliing leaves from trees. It also adds a optimalizations mods like sodium, lithium, scalablelux and so on. But this modpack also adds new structures, bundles, new enchants, more plants, cooking, hammocks and more! 

Everything is kept in a vanilla-like style.

Casual Vanilla uses the [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack ](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
